title: Fresh Textures
description: Refresh your vanilla Minecraft gaming experience with new textures!
body:
**Fresh Textures** — is a unique resource pack created by combining various resourcepacks into one large and harmonious package. Its goal is to refresh and improve the familiar vanilla Minecraft, giving it new colors and modern sound. Our main mission is to reimagine the classic textures of the game, breathing life into them and filling them with inspiration to make the gameplay even more exciting. In addition, this resource pack provides extensive mod support, making it as versatile and appealing as possible for players with a wide range of preferences.

## ⚙️ Compatibility
It is recommended to use these mods for full resource pack compatibility, but it is not required.
*   [\[EMF\] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
*   [\[ETF\] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
*   [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or 1.21.2+ [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)

## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!


## ❗Credits
Resourcespacks that were used to create "FreshTextures":

- [Torches Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/torches-reimagined) - used a 3d model of the torches and modified them a bit afterwards
- [Chests Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chests-reimagined) - used the chest and the trap chest.
- [Extended lantern](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/extended-illumina/versions)
- [Hidyk's Realm](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hidyksrealm) ( most of the textures were taken from him! )
- [Refined Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-enchants)
- [Enchantment Glows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantment-glows) - was taken the idea of 3d arrows in crossbow and bow, which is more logical for minecraft.
- [Retextured Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/retextured-minecraft)
- [Archery Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/archeryrevamped) - edit
- [Armor Trim Preview](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/armor-trim-preview)
- [Brush & Juice](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brush-and-juice)
- [Modded Omelet - Modern Spawn Eggs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-omelet)
- [Cubic Sun & Moon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubic-sun-moon)

  
**(If you are the author of one of the resourcepacks or a resourcepack that is not on this list, message me in Discord)**
